description: Legal document. Location: Fustat. Dated: 6 Tishrei 1530 Seleucid, which is 1218 CE. Inventory of a dead perfumer's shop, taken for purposes of dividing the goods between his son Abū l-Faḍl and Abū Saʿīd b. Abū l-Manṣūr. The executor is Netanel ha-Sar ha-Rofe. Goods include ʿabīr; ʿūd; rāwand. On verso there is a note in a different hand with the name of a woman. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי. מיקום: פוסטאט. מתוארך: 6 תשרי 1530 שטרות = 1218 לספירה; מלאי חנות בשמים של נפטר לצורך חלוקה בין יורשיו
